title: Slovakian Fermented Hash
description: A hearty Slovakian dish made with fermented hash, sauerkraut, and Slovakian ingredients. Perfect for a cold winter's day.
instructions: Heat a non-stick pan over medium heat.
Add the Slovakian hash and cook for 2-3 minutes, breaking it up with a spatula.
Add the sauerkraut and cook for another 2-3 minutes, stirring frequently.
If using fermented sour cream, stir it in during the last minute of cooking.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Serve hot, garnished with chopped fresh chives.
